action_text: Click the page-level "Search" control for the reports list to activate it
rationale: The last attempt to type into the report list search failed because it isn’t an input; clicking it should activate or expand the real search field so we can then type the report title.

action_text: Click the magnifying-glass button next to the reports list search
rationale: The magnifying-glass icon next to the list search often toggles/focuses the actual input; using it may open the searchable field.

action_text: Type "Incidents by agent" into the global search box
rationale: If the list search won’t activate, use the global search to quickly find the “Incidents by agent” report by title.

action_text: Click the Title column header to sort reports by title
rationale: If search is unavailable, sorting by Title can help quickly locate the report manually.

action_text: Click the filter/toggle icon on the report list to open filtering options
rationale: Opening the list filter panel may provide a text filter (e.g., Title contains) to find the report.
